creator's note:
first time posting a bot, kinda nervous

sooo... my first ever bot! you may be wondering-- hmm, day one? this is actually the sixth of october... and that may be cus i procrastinated too much...? so my plan was one bot everyday, but im gunna start that from eight: my submission for the sixth day will come out tmrw, while my submission for the eight day will come out on eighth itself, yipee!!!

after that i'll try to make one everyday (with probably some breaks inbetween, but its fun to make ocs, so)

i dont think this will get popular, but to anyone who sees this, im making shit up along the way, and if anyone likes my bots, they can request alts and other things! i dont have an 'official requests page' obvi, cus like, this is still my first ever bot, but just say it in the comments and ill try to do it after kinktober ehhehehfh

tysm!!!!
